decoder.name: gravityzone_child
decoder.regex: .*(AntiMalware).*dvchost=(\S+) \S+ dvc=(\S+) \S+ BitdefenderGZMalwareType=(\S+) BitdefenderGZMalwareName=(.*) BitdefenderGZMalwareHash=(\S+) act=(\S+) filePath=(\S+) BitdefenderGZDetectionTime=(\S+).*BitdefenderGZCleanedMalwareCnt=(\d+) BitdefenderGZBlockedMalwareCnt=(\d+) BitdefenderGZDeletedMalwareCnt=(\d+) BitdefenderGZQuarantinedMalwareCnt=(\d+) BitdefenderGZIgnoredMalwareCnt=(\d+) BitdefenderGZPresentMalwareCnt=(\d+) suser=(\S+).*

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : SSH session was opened for '(\w+)@(\S+)'

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : SSH login has failed for '(\w+)@(\S+)'

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : SSH session was closed for '(\w+)@(\S+)'

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : (\S+) on (\S+) in (\S+) is powered off

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : (\S+) on (\S+) in (\S+) has powered on

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : Guest OS shut down for (\S+) on (\S+) in (\S+)

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : Guest OS reboot for (\S+) on (\S+) in (\S+)

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : File upload to path '\[(.+)' was initiated

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : Deletion of file or directory (.+) from (\S+) was initiated

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : Account (\S+) was created on host (\S+)

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : Password was changed for account (\S+) on host (\S+)

decoder.name: esxi-syslog
decoder.regex: Event (\d+) : Account (\S+) was removed on host (\S+)
